title: astragalus humistratus var. humivagans
intro: Astragalus humistratus var. humivagans is a variety of the Astragalus humistratus plant, belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the milkvetch or goat's-thorn. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus humistratus var. humivagans include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and exhibit anti-aging properties. In traditional herbal medicine, this plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues and cardiovascular disease.
